languages.text: {n}Эоганн устало сжимает переносицу.{/n} "Технически, вы абсолютно правы и мой коллега не обладает кардиоваскулярной системой. Однако вы приписываете ему утверждения, которые он не произосил".

{n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн устало сжимает переносицу.{/n} "Технически, вы абсолютно правы и мой коллега не обладает кардиоваскулярной системой. Однако вы приписываете ему утверждения, которые он не произосил".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

{n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

{n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se pellizca el puente de la nariz con expresión de hastío.{/n} «Técnicamente tiene toda la razón, y mi colega carece de sistema cardiovascular. Sin embargo, le atribuye afirmaciones que no ha expresado en ningún momento».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se pellizca el puente de la nariz con expresión de hastío.{/n} «Técnicamente tiene toda la razón, y mi colega carece de sistema cardiovascular. Sin embargo, le atribuye afirmaciones que no ha expresado en ningún momento».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡疲惫地捏了捏鼻梁。{/n}“从技术层面来说，您说的完全正确，我的同僚确实没有心血管系统。然而，您这是在把他根本没说过的话强加给他。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡疲惫地捏了捏鼻梁。{/n}“从技术层面来说，您说的完全正确，我的同僚确实没有心血管系统。然而，您这是在把他根本没说过的话强加给他。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se pince l'arête du nez d'un air las.{/n} « Techniquement, vous avez raison : mon collègue est dépourvu de système cardiovasculaire. Cependant, vous lui faites dire des choses qu'il n'a pas dites. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se pince l'arête du nez d'un air las.{/n} « Techniquement, vous avez raison : mon collègue est dépourvu de système cardiovasculaire. Cependant, vous lui faites dire des choses qu'il n'a pas dites. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, yorgun bir şekilde burnunun kemerini sıkıyor.{/n} "Teknik olarak tamamen haklısınız... Meslektaşım bir kardiyovasküler sisteme sahip değil. Ancak ona söylemediği sözler atfediyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, yorgun bir şekilde burnunun kemerini sıkıyor.{/n} "Teknik olarak tamamen haklısınız... Meslektaşım bir kardiyovasküler sisteme sahip değil. Ancak ona söylemediği sözler atfediyorsunuz."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは疲れたように鼻梁をつまんだ。{/n}「技術的には、あなたはまったく正しく、我が同僚は心血管系を持ちません。しかし、あなたは彼がしてもいない発言を彼に帰しています」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは疲れたように鼻梁をつまんだ。{/n}「技術的には、あなたはまったく正しく、我が同僚は心血管系を持ちません。しかし、あなたは彼がしてもいない発言を彼に帰しています」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn reibt sich müde den Nasenrücken.{/n} "Technisch gesehen habt Ihr absolut recht. Mein Kollege hat kein kardiovaskuläres System. Allerdings unterstellt Ihr ihm Aussagen, die er nicht getroffen hat."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pinches the bridge of his nose wearily.{/n} "Technically, you are entirely correct, and my colleague does not possess a cardiovascular system. However, you are attributing statements to him that he did not make."
